name: redirect
description:
Issues an HTTP redirect to the client without forwarding the request to the upstream backend (Gateway-API RequestRedirect semantics).
Only the components you set are overridden; every component left unset is preserved from the incoming request (scheme, host, path, query). The port is preserved too, except that overriding the scheme without setting a port switches to the target scheme's default port.
The policy builds the Location header from the request plus the overrides and returns the configured redirect status.
